## Problem

Which maintainer or contributor workflow is difficult today?

## Proposed behavior

What should StellarOps Kit help users do?

## Stellar/Soroban relevance

Does this relate to wallets, RPC, contracts, transaction flows, documentation, or testing?

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] The feature has clear user-facing behavior.
- [ ] The implementation path includes docs or tests where appropriate.
